title: taraxacum mutilum
intro: Taraxacum mutilum, also known as dwarf dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion genus, characterized by its small stature and leaves resembling those of the common dandelion. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its rich content of bioactive compounds, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpenoids, which possess medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Taraxacum mutilum include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health concerns. Taraxacum mutilum can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized in a range of herbal preparations.
